question.text: What type of option style is used for exchange-traded currency options in India?

answer.text: Premium style European Call and Put options

explanation.text: **The Logic:** All exchange-traded currency options in India are European style — they can be exercised only at expiry, not before. Both OTC and exchange-traded currency options in India are European. **The Trap:** American options (early exercise) are NOT available for currency options on Indian exchanges. **Cross-Exam Context:** Option style is specific to Series I. **Distributor's Pro-Tip:** Even though European options can't be exercised early, they can be SOLD (squared off) in the secondary market at any time before expiry.
